violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. A CFSM application was left with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

The 2 door lowboy refrigeration unit was observed with water pooling inside. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain in order to prevent possible contamination of the foods. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the dry storage bins have an accumulation of food debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

The floors under the equipment throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
